name: BBQ Flank Steak
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flank steak with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add red wine vinegar, minced garlic, lemon zest, and juice to the skillet.
4. Sear the flank steak for 1-2 minutes per side until browned.
5. Transfer the skillet to the grill and cook for an additional 4-6 minutes on each side, or until desired internal temperature is reached (medium-rare: 130°F).
6. Remove from heat and let rest for 10 minutes before slicing against the grain.
